zh.lifeSummary: 當Joyce de la Zouche於大約1318年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 德 拉 祖時，她的父親William de la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche of Richard's Castle45歲，母親Alice de Tosny35歲。她於1347年5月31日之前與Sir John Botetourt在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1372年5月4日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾金頓享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾卡素 利波迪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joyce de la Zouche于大约1318年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 德 拉 祖时，她的父亲William de la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche of Richard's Castle45岁，母亲Alice de Tosny35岁。她于1347年5月31日之前与Sir John Botetourt在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1372年5月4日在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾金頓享年55岁，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾卡素 利波迪。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Zouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Zaucha
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Andrzej, Casimir, Franciszek, Kazimierz, Krzysztof, Mieczyslaw, Rafal, Wojciech.
Polish: descriptive nickname from za uchem ‘behind the ear’, denoting someone who had something behind one of his ears. Compare Zoucha .

nameMeanings.name: Joyce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently from the Norman male name Josce (Middle English Josse), which in turn is from Jodocus, a Latinized form of a Breton name, Iodoc, meaning ‘lord’, borne by a 7th-century Breton saint. The name was in use in England among Breton followers of William the Conqueror. However, although this was fairly common as a male given name in the Middle Ages, it had virtually died out by the 14th century. There is evidence of its use as a girl's name from the 16th century onwards in parishes with strong Puritan links, which suggests that it may have been associated with the vocabulary word joy; see Joy . It was strongly revived in the 19th century under the influence of popular fiction. It is borne by characters in Mrs Henry Wood's East Lynne ( 1861 ) and Edna Lyall's In the Golden Days ( 1885 ). Modern use may well have been influenced also by the common Irish surname derived from the medieval Norman male name. See also Joss .

en.lifeSummary: When Joyce de la Zouche was born about 1318, in Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche of Richard's Castle, was 45 and her mother, Alice de Tosny, was 35. She married Sir John Botetourt before 31 May 1347, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 9 daughters. She died on 4 May 1372, in Kington, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55, and was buried in Castle Liberty, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joyce de la Zouche est née environ 1318, à Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche of Richard's Castle, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Alice de Tosny, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Botetourt avant 31 mai 1347, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 mai 1372, à Kington, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Castle Liberty, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joyce de la Zouche um 1318 in Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche of Richard's Castle 45 und ihre Mutter Alice de Tosny 35. Sie hat vor 31. Mai 1347 in England, United Kingdom Sir John Botetourt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 9 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Mai 1372 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Kington, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Castle Liberty, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joyce de la Zouche è nata il circa 1318 nel Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William de la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche of Richard's Castle, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Alice de Tosny, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Botetourt prima del 31 maggio 1347, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 9 figlie. Morì il 4 maggio 1372, nel Kington, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Castle Liberty, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joyce de la Zoucheが約1318年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアアシュビー ド ラ ゾウチで生まれた時，父William de la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche of Richard's Castleは45歳，母Alice de Tosnyは35歳であった。1347年5月31日以前にイギリスイギリスでSir John Botetourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1372年5月4日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアキントンで55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアカストル リバートイにて埋葬された。

ko.Tewkesbury Abbey, Gloucestershire, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이 튜케스버이 애브브이
ko.Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, E: 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 워윅 워윅 카스틀
ko.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애쉬비 데 라 즈우치
ko.lifeSummary: Joyce de la Zouche(이)가 대략 1318년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애쉬비 데 라 즈우치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche of Richard's Castle(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Tosny(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1347년 5월 31일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir John Botetourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1372년 5월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 킨그턴에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 카스틀 리버티에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joyce de la Zouche nasceu aproximadamente 1318, em Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche of Richard's Castle, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Tosny, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Botetourt antes 31 de maio de 1347, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de maio de 1372, em Kington, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Castle Liberty, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joyce de la Zouche родилась около 1318 г. в местности ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche of Richard's Castle было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Tosny, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Botetourt перед 31 май 1347 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 9 дочерей. Она умерла 4 мая 1372 г. в местности кингтон, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности кастл либирти, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joyce de la Zouche nació aproximadamente 1318, en Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche of Richard's Castle, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Alice de Tosny, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Sir John Botetourt antes de 31 de mayo de 1347, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 9 hijas. Murió el 4 de mayo de 1372, en Kington, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Castle Liberty, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
